description: Command injection via popen: user input interpolated into shell command via sprintf then passed to popen

expected.notes: popen() executes shell command constructed from user input
sprintf used to build command string — buffer overflow risk
user_input flows through sprintf into popen — taint engine may not track through sprintf buffer
